Model first.
Builder now.

Ten years across fashion markets — on set, on runway and on location. The value is not only the credits; it is the industry pattern recognition built from being inside the machine.

That experience now feeds Booked: a lean infrastructure company helping fashion creatives become easier to find, understand, trust and book.

GET SIGNED.

The Get Signed Accelerator

Four weeks.
Made industry-readable.

Built for working models who aren't booking at their level. Your portfolio, your digital presence, your booking path — assessed and rebuilt from the inside out.

This is not a course. It is a structured process with a defined outcome, built on a decade of first-hand industry experience across seven global markets.

01
Diagnosis
Full Scan audit. Portfolio sequencing review. Agency gaps mapped. You see exactly what's holding you back.
02
Infrastructure
Bio rewrite. Portfolio sequencing fixed. Contact friction removed. What needs to exist — built or briefed.
03
Positioning
Market category clarified. Agency outreach list built. One clear positioning line — usable everywhere.
04
Activation
Outreach sent. Follow-up sequence drafted. Instagram and RedNote updated. Measurable output by end of week four.
